text:

As a direct Microsoft partner, we offer the best deliverability at the best price.

Fully done-for-you: we create your inboxes, upload them to your sequencer, and configure sending/warmup settings.


http://
deliveron.org

LinkedIn will probably sue me for this… but f**k it

I cracked mass LinkedIn outreach using ID-Verified Accounts and a 0-Day Bypass

Send thousands of InMails per day at a fraction of the cost

Like + comment “zero” and I’ll DM you the method

look if you have an idea for a company stop doing all this performative founder shit

nobody cares about your logo

nobody cares about your website that took 3 months to build

you know what validates an idea? sending 10k cold emails a day for like $500/mo and seeing if anyone

ai won't just replace jobs, it'll expose the fact that 90% of human thought is already low-iq and easily replicated. ur 'original idea' is just a re-packaging of old data. the purpose of ai is to make u realize how little of a 'human' u really are.

create ai grandma linkedin account

name her wendy

give her a midwest smile and a banner that says “measure your metrics”

title her “marketing director” so she feels safe

drop a dm that starts with “hey there! i might be totally off base”

boomer reads it

feels like he’s

real Gs understand a man with a love for the game. 

this chick thinks building something is about getting a paycheck, not about the conquest. 

her brain is too small to comprehend ambition. 

all she sees are numbers, and all she hears is the sound of her own vapid commentary.

the good thing about sinking ur teeth into learning cold email/linkedin outreach first is that u can run up and validate any offer extremely quick

literally every remotely successful b2b founder will confirm that distribution is key and once u crack pmf nothing else matters
